title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Sanji, Vegapunk, Kizaru, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: destroy the ships if you need to.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "You're hopeless...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Even with the Seraphim back under control...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are we meant to flush them out...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This 'frontier dome' is a real nuisance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It sure is a marvel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The agents are attempting to block off all exits.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've probably taken care of the ships too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and vega force 01 can only fly on the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn, the enemy is quite shrewd!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perfect! That means we get to avenge atlas! I'm raring to go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uhh, no...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They shouldn't even be able to get up here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they won't let us get away without a fight...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's going on? Something fun?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ullith! If all you've got in mind is another brainless attack, knock it off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even, all've, oh!ve's a reckon that's gonna up a real inventing - DGE piece

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah reckon it's gonna be a real cutting- edge piece of tech!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're determined to ignore the navy, aren't you, Lucci?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I refuse to accept straw hat as an emperor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why can't we retaliate against these fools?! They're after our necks!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fighting back isn't our objective, ensuring the main body's escape is.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: As satellites, it's our duty to prioritize...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The Stella's safety above all else! We may be expendable...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but you running off on a vendetta will only cause us more trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THAT GOODY GOOD ACT OF YOURS REALLY GETS ON MY NERVES!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's too bad.

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Still... I'm so sorry, Sentomaru....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That only happened because you're so loyal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still have another WAY on this island we can call on... should we?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold your horses! Won'tcha be riskin' them too if we ask for help?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'd have nowhere left to hide if they're in the government's sights too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: be that as it may...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hello? I'm in a big pinch! Please save me-quasar....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He asked so shamelessly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course. I've always been prepared for this order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WOWZA!! Looks like they're gonna help us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kerchak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Escape should be easy as pie now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we focus and make sure CPO is kept busy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Especially since the Stella has secured passage on the straw hat's ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take us to the port with vega force 01!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I approve. Let's hurry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who put you in charge?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, folks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm all packed. Please take the SEVEN of us to your ship-quasar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Seven?! You're all coming?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHA...? THAT SOUNDS LIKE A PAIN.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care! So long as lilith-chan tags along!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HELL YEAH! A VOYAGE WITH SEVEN FACES OF THE WORLD'S BEST SCIENTIST!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lab Interior

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bonney!! Hold up!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: THAT VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think he'd stoop to using bugs against me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's what you're mad about?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! I promised to get that old-timer outta here in one piece!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Don't beat him up!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 60 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
